center.name: 邦盖群岛县
center.summary: 邦盖群岛县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括苏拉八色鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs in the Sula and Banggai Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs in the Sula and Banggai Islands
